package rulecoverage

func NegativeSmtpPlaintextAuth() string {
    ruleID := "smtp_plaintext_auth"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`smtp.PlainAuth` used without TLS (`smtp.SendMail` to non-TLS endpoints)"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
